title: Epic`s Origins
description: Origins addon that adds 5 new origins with custom appearance and evolutions.
body:
This addon replaces default origins with 5 new custom origins. Each has an evolution.

## Origins

<details>  
  <summary>Slime</summary>

|Pros                   |Cons                   |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
|You don`t take damage from falling and flying into walls|Now you have 16 health like a big slime|
|You spring off the floor like from slime blocks|         |
|You can change you color or remove it whenever you want| |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Kitsune</summary>

|Pros                                               |Cons                   |
|:-------------------------------------------------:|:---------------------:|
|Your health is increased by 1 heart                |Wolves will always attack you and you are getting weak near them|
|You have 1.5 higher speed                          | |
|You can turn into a fox and back to your human form| |
|You have a fox tail and ears                       | |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Fairy</summary>

|Pros                              |Cons                                      |
|:--------------------------------:|:----------------------------------------:|
|You can fly but only for 5 seconds|You have only 8 health                    |
|You have natural regeneration     |You`re just small (works only with pehkui)|
|You have wings on your back       |Your damage is divided by 3               |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Mermaid</summary>

|Pros                              |Cons                                      |
|:--------------------------------:|:----------------------------------------:|
|You can breathe underwater         |You can`t breathe on land     |
|Your swim speed is highly increased|You are getting slower and weaker when you out of the water|
|You may break blocks underwater as others do on land|             |
|Your vision underwater is perfect  |                              |
|When underwater, you do not sink to the ground unless you want to||
|You have a fish tail without legs  |                              |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Demon</summary>

|Pros                              |Cons                                      |
|:--------------------------------:|:----------------------------------------:|
|You have an extra defense|Your natural spawn will be in the Nether|
|You are immune to all types of fire damage|                       |
|When on fire, you deal additional damage with your attacks|       |
|You have demon horns and tail|                                    |
</details>

## Evolutions

<details>  
  <summary>Slime king</summary>

|Pros                   |Cons                   |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
|You don`t take damage from falling and flying into walls|None|
|You spring off the floor like from slime blocks|         |
|You can change you color or remove it whenever you want| |
|You have 28 health| |
|You can shoot slime balls where you look| |
|You can do a BIG JUMP| |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Nine tailed kitsune</summary>

|Pros                                   |Cons                   |
|:-------------------------------------:|:---------------------:|
|Your health is increased by 9 hearts|Wolves will always attack you and you are getting weak near them|
|You have 2 times higher speed| |
|You can turn into a fox and back to your human form| |
|You have a fox tail and ears| |
|You can disappear in an illusion and weaken all entities in 6 block radius| |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Angel</summary>

|Pros                              |Cons                                      |
|:--------------------------------:|:----------------------------------------:|
|You can fly infinitely|None|
|You have high natural regeneration| |
|You have beautiful white wings| |
|You deal 2 times more damage to undead mobs| |
|You can clear all effects from you and nearby players| |
|You can get 8 additional hearts for a minute| |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Oceanid</summary>

|Pros                              |Cons                                      |
|:--------------------------------:|:----------------------------------------:|
|You can breathe underwater         |You can`t breathe on land     |
|Your swim speed is highly increased|You are getting slower and weaker when you out of the water|
|You may break blocks underwater as others do on land| |
|Your vision underwater is perfect| |
|When underwater, you do not sink to the ground unless you want to||
|You can stay in air much longer| |
|You look like a blue water spirit| |
|You can made mobs around you become neutral| |
|You can change weather to rain or clear the weather if its raining| |
</details>

<details>  
  <summary>Asura</summary>

|Pros                              |Cons                                      |
|:--------------------------------:|:----------------------------------------:|
|You have an extra defense|Your natural spawn will be in the Nether|
|You are immune to all types of fire damage| |
|When you are in fire, you deal 1.5 times more damage| |
|You have demon horns and tail| |
|You can set yourself on fire and become less susceptible to damage| |
|You can create an aura in which all nearby entities will be getting fire damage for a time| |
</details>

### **This addon is only in beta, so there might be bugs.**
